product_highlights: Moisture-triggered release systems for hair and skin care
Sustainable microcapsule platform meeting EU microplastics regulation compliance
notes: Givaudan is one of the world's largest fragrance and flavor companies, with a dedicated encapsulation technology division delivering industry-leading fragrance encapsulation for personal care applications including shampoos, conditioners, body washes, and fabric care. Their Nexarome™ platform represents a critical response to EU microplastics regulations, offering biodegradable microcapsule alternatives without compromising fragrance longevity. As a global partner to major beauty brands, Givaudan's encapsulation technologies are essential intelligence for the SKIN-TWIN sensory formulation engine.
